Revision 'quantum-intel-frontend-00006-mbs' is not ready and cannot serve traffic. The user-provided container failed to start and listen on the port defined provided by the PORT=8080 environment variable within the allocated timeout. This can happen when the container port is misconfigured or if the timeout is too short. The health check timeout can be extended. Logs for this revision might contain more information.

textPayload:
Default STARTUP TCP probe failed 1 time consecutively for container "quantum-intel-frontend-1" on port 8080. The instance was not started.
Connection failed with status CANCELLED.
Starting new instance. Reason: DEPLOYMENT_ROLLOUT - Instance started due to traffic shifting between revisions due to deployment, traffic split adjustment, or deployment health check.
